top3.sql:
SELECT AVG(overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND pa.date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT AVG(overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND pa.date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2010' AND '2015';

SELECT AVG(overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND pa.date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';

SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND strftime('%Y', pa.date) BETWEEN '2010' AND '2015';

SELECT AVG(pa.overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND CAST(strftime('%Y', pa.date) AS INTEGER) BETWEEN 2010 AND 2015;

final.sql:
SELECT AVG(overall_rating) 
FROM Player_Attributes pa
JOIN Player p ON pa.player_api_id = p.player_api_id
WHERE p.height > 170 
  AND pa.date BETWEEN '2010-01-01' AND '2015-12-31';
